---
title: "Cerebellar Transcriptomics in Schizophrenia and Bipolar Disorder Implicate Unique and Shared Genetic Mechanisms and Cortical Co-Expression Networks"
presenter: Jessica Turner
pres_group: presentations
date: '2026-05-01'
event: SOBP 2026
description: "Jessica A. Turner, Jordan Albrecht, Nora I. Perrone-Bizzozero, J.Liu"
image: presentation.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](presentation.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}


![](jesspresent.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
